understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level without landing on spike tiles, using at most 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt, progressing through levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After the horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK can remove/interact with clickable tiles (notably breakable 'x' blocks) at a specified [x,y] to open/alter fall paths, and UNDO reverts the previous action. Landing on spikes ('u'/'v') ends the attempt immediately.
